title: Of the Faith of the Fathers
venue: A. C. McClurg and Co., Chicago

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Of the Faith of the Fathers (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Souls of Black Folk.
excerpt: Dim face of Beauty haunting all the world, Fair face of Beauty all too fair to see, Where the lost stars adown the heavens are hurled,— There, there alone for thee May white peace be. Beauty, sad face of Beauty, Mystery, Wonder, What are these...
